summary: Frontend-only validation of new /solutions/healthcare-infrastructure dedicated page (16 sections). Verified all BRD-required content, counts, headlines, scenarios, action buttons, and navigation via Playwright DOM innerText assertions. 46/46 content checks passed with zero console errors. Navigation /solutions <-> /solutions/healthcare-infrastructure works.
critical_code_review_comments: HealthcareInfrastructure.jsx is 503 lines with 14 inline section components - consider splitting into /components/healthcare/{Hero,ProblemSection,InfrastructureStack,ConnectedRailsVisual,WhoItServes,UserJourneys,CoreModules,DexaIntelligence,DexaScenarios,Architecture,DeploymentModels,UseCasesSection,OutcomesSection,FinalCTA}.jsx for maintainability. Functionally fine.

Both Final CTA buttons (hc-final-build-cta and hc-final-talk-cta) link to the same /contact route. If 'Talk to Mentor Global' is meant for a different intent (e.g., demo request or mailto), consider differentiating destinations or adding a query param.
Hero secondary CTA links to /dexa (Explore DEXA Intelligence) - this route is not part of this page's scope but verified to exist via prior iterations.
Consider adding scroll-to-top on route change since this page is very long; currently scroll position may be retained when navigating between solution pages.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Healthcare Infrastructure page tested via DOM innerText checks against data-testids: hc-hero (headline, supporting text 'Deploy connected healthcare rails', 6 product cards Employee App/Corporate Portal/Claims Workflow/Provider Network/DEXA Intelligence/Wallet & Pools), hc-problem (8 cards with 01-08 markers), hc-stack (6 rails Access/Benefit/Claims/Provider/Financial/Intelligence each with 10+ items), hc-rails-visual (Mentor Healthcare Infrastructure hub + Powered by), hc-stakeholders (6: Employers/Employees and Dependents/TPAs/Insurers/Providers/Governments and Public Programs), hc-journeys (5: Employee/HR/Provider/TPA or Insurer/Finance), hc-modules (12 modules), hc-dexa (contains 'does not replace HR' and 'does not diagnose'), hc-dexa-scenarios (Aga Khan + Claim on Hold with action buttons Upload Prescription/View Claim/Talk to Support + HR Spend Analysis), hc-architecture (7 layers L1-L7), hc-deployment (6 cards), hc-use-cases (10 cards), hc-outcomes (12 items), hc-final-cta (Build Healthcare Infrastructure + Talk to Mentor Global). Navigation /solutions <-> /solutions/healthcare-infrastructure verified. Zero console errors.
rca_of_the_issue: No issues found - all 16 sections render with correct BRD content.
